items.title: Watch: Iran says no direct talks with U.S. in Islamabad planned
items.summary: Iran has ruled out direct talks with the United States as Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi visits Pakistan. Tehran says no face-to-face meetings are planned, with Islamabad expec...

items.title: 31 sloths die in Florida before opening of attraction
items.summary: Many died due to conditions at a Florida warehouse where they'd been shipped, while others arrived from South America dead, authorities say.

items.title: Japan’s New Care Workers: Bodybuilders, Wrestlers and M.M.A. Fighters
items.summary: Young athletes are being recruited to plug a staff shortage in Japan’s nursing homes. The results are reshaping elder care.
